proposals.title: Switch off debug mode for live model validation
proposals.description: Set DEBUG_MODE=false to re-enable CLI/API model calls once token budget and provider access are ready.
proposals.expected_impact: Restores full model reasoning and real confidence calibration.

proposals.title: Enable paper mode to start accumulating real observations
proposals.description: Set RUN_MODE=paper to begin real LLM analysis and build evidence for strategy improvement proposals.
proposals.expected_impact: Enables evidence-based evolution after first few trading days.
